global.description: The ad features a combination of logos, a headline, and a call-to-action button against a textured background.
global.main_message: Promoting hotel and flight bookings with a focus on convenience.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Fly smarter Hotels
elements.description: A bold, modern font displaying the text 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap' in a vibrant turquoise color.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: MWOX logo
elements.description: A stylized logo with the text '[CUcll] MWOX' in a bright yellow color, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'WayPoint' in a clean, bold font at the top left corner.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Get offer' in white on a turquoise background, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Qaaoa8 text
elements.description: A small, unclear text element labeled 'Qaaoa8:' in a muted color, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Icrioo text
elements.description: A small text element labeled 'Icrioo' in a light color, located at the top left corner.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A bright yellow badge with the text 'SALE' in bold, contrasting color, positioned at the top right corner.
